channel.title: Maryland MVA Study Podcast
channel.description: Audio review materials for the Maryland Driver's License Exam. Study for the MVA knowledge test with chapter-by-chapter audio guides.
channel.itunes:author: MVA Study Guide
channel.itunes:summary: Prepare for your Maryland driver's license exam with these audio study guides.

item.title: Chapter 1: Driving Tests Requirements
item.description: Learn about driving tests requirements for the Maryland MVA exam.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 1: Driving Tests Requirements

item.title: Chapter 2: The Maryland GDL System
item.description: Learn about the maryland gdl system for the Maryland MVA exam.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 2: The Maryland GDL System

item.title: Chapter 3: Basic Driving
item.description: Learn about basic driving for the Maryland MVA exam.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 3: Basic Driving

item.title: Chapter 4: Speed and Right-of-Way
item.description: Learn about speed and right-of-way for the Maryland MVA exam.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 4: Speed and Right-of-Way

item.title: Chapter 5: Traffic Signs and Signals
item.description: Learn about traffic signs and signals for the Maryland MVA exam.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 5: Traffic Signs and Signals

item.title: Chapter 6: Parking
item.description: Learn about parking for the Maryland MVA exam.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 6: Parking

item.title: Chapter 7: Sharing the Road
item.description: Learn about sharing the road for the Maryland MVA exam.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 7: Sharing the Road

item.title: Chapter 8: Crashes and Traffic Stops
item.description: Learn about crashes and traffic stops for the Maryland MVA exam.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 8: Crashes and Traffic Stops

item.title: Chapter 9: Other Restrictions
item.description: Learn about other restrictions for the Maryland MVA exam.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 9: Other Restrictions

item.title: Chapter 10: Insurance and Safety
item.description: Learn about insurance and safety for the Maryland MVA exam.
item.itunes:title: Chapter 10: Insurance and Safety

item.description: Learn about chapter 1 for the Maryland MVA exam.
item.itunes:title: Rookie Chapter 1: Chapter 1
